title: paeonia × moutan var. papaveracea
intro: Paeonia × moutan var. papaveracea, commonly known as the Tree Peony or Moutan, is a variety of flowering plant that belongs to the Paeonia genus. It is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and reduce pain. The health benefits of Paeonia × moutan var. papaveracea include reducing anxiety and stress, promoting relaxation, and improving sleep quality. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, which can be used to promote overall well-being and support the body's natural healing processes.
